philosophy: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Tactical Precision with Consumer Trust.
Emotion First: Safety is about Calm (Green) vs. Urgency (Red).
Content is King: Data must be legible in high-stress situations.
Zoom In: Big buttons, clear status indicators.
Negative Space: Reduce cognitive load during emergencies.
Contrast: High contrast is non-negotiable for safety apps.

usage_rules.headings: Uppercase, tracking-tight, bold weights (600/700). Use for status states (SAFE, ALERT, SOS).
usage_rules.body: Regular weights, generous line-height (1.6). High legibility.

rules: Mobile: Single column stack for urgency.
Desktop: Dashboard layout with Sidebar (Left) + Bento Grid (Right).
SOS Button: Always fixed/sticky or centrally prominent.

SOSButton.description: The heart of the app. A large circular button that requires a 'Press and Hold' interaction to prevent false positives.
SOSButton.interaction: Hold for 3 seconds. Visual ring fills up. Haptic feedback on complete.
SOSButton.styling: h-32 w-32 or h-48 w-48. Rounded-full. Border-4 border-danger/30. Inner pulse animation.
SOSButton.motion: Animate scale [1, 1.05, 1] loop. Ring fill uses SVG stroke-dasharray.

StatusBanner.description: Top banner indicating current safety status.
StatusBanner.styling: w-full py-3 px-4 flex items-center justify-between backdrop-blur-md

GlassCard.description: Container for trusted circle, incidents, and trip details.
GlassCard.styling: bg-zinc-900/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-xl rounded-2xl

Navigation.mobile: Bottom Tab Bar (Glassmorphism). Icons: Shield (Home), Map (Trips), Users (Family), Menu.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge (or yarn add)
THEME: Ensure tailwind.config.js has darkMode: 'class' and defines the custom colors under 'extend'.
SOS LOGIC: The SOS button must utilize 'useLongPress' hook logic or framer-motion gestures (onTapStart, onPanEnd). Do not make it a simple click.
MAPS: Use a dark-themed map style (e.g., Mapbox Dark or Google Maps Night Mode JSON style). If using a placeholder, use a dark abstract map image.
TESTING: Add data-testid to the SOS button ('sos-trigger'), Status Banner ('status-banner'), and Trusted Circle list ('trusted-circle-list').

universal_guidelines.do_not_center_align_app: The .App class must not have text-align: center.
universal_guidelines.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring (ring-2 ring-brand-safe) for accessibility.
universal_guidelines.error_states: Form errors should be displayed in brand-danger text with an alert icon.
universal_guidelines.touch_targets: Minimum 44px for all mobile interactive elements.
